# Nitzan Tregerman

> Freelance motion designer and visual effects artist specializing in SideFX Houdini, Blender, and After Effects. Five years of post-production and commercial VFX experience. Creator of the open-source ntLib Houdini library.

## About

- Name: Nitzan Tregerman
- Role: Motion Designer & VFX Artist
- Tools: SideFX Houdini, Blender, After Effects, DaVinci Resolve, Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro
- Specialties: 3D animation, procedural generation, VEX programming, particle and fluid simulations, stylized character work
- Location: Israel
- Contact: nitzan@nitzantregerman.com
- Website: https://www.nitzantregerman.com

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.nitzantregerman.com/): Portfolio overview with featured projects.
- [About](https://www.nitzantregerman.com/about): Background, expertise, and contact information.
- [Sitemap](https://www.nitzantregerman.com/sitemap): All pages on the site.

## Notable projects

- [Showreel 2025](https://www.nitzantregerman.com/work/showreel-2025): Showreel and R&D compilation.
- [ntLib](https://www.nitzantregerman.com/work/ntlib): Open-source Houdini HDA library for simulating dynamics and procedural generation. GitHub: https://github.com/nitzan-treg
- [Peres Academy](https://www.nitzantregerman.com/work/peres-academy)
- [Pelephone 5G](https://www.nitzantregerman.com/work/pelephone-5g)
- [Cellcom Fiber](https://www.nitzantregerman.com/work/cellcom-fiber)
- [TLV Hug](https://www.nitzantregerman.com/work/tlv-hug)
- [Partner Fiber](https://www.nitzantregerman.com/work/partner-fiber)
- [Whakatane](https://www.nitzantregerman.com/work/whakatane)
- [Meshek Tzuriel](https://www.nitzantregerman.com/work/meshek-tzuriel)
- [Paz Charge](https://www.nitzantregerman.com/work/paz-charge)
